description: Primary KoalaByte Blue firmware theme with eucalyptus branch borders, bark/gold jungle title styling, blue KoalaByte Blue accent text, and purple/green glowing eyes.

visual_style.border_style: leafy eucalyptus branches around text/menu items
visual_style.title_style: large chunky carved jungle lettering inspired by the KoalaByte Blue poster reference
visual_style.font_license_note: No third-party font file is bundled. Use licensed fonts only in private/custom builds.

menu.selected_item_style: leafy rounded textbox with cyber green edge glow
